creator: js@iksz.hu
text: Here comes the diff. I really hope it arrives correctly. If not, I have a gzip-ed uuencoded version too. Please note some of the linuxisms, like setting close-on-exec during open(2), requesting read-ahead for mmap(2), and advising the system not to allow access of malloc(2)-ed data to child processes were reimplemented (coe + open), or just stubbed out (MAP_POPULATE and MADV_DONTFORK).
